entries.name: include
entries.documentation: Includes another source file during preprocessing.

entries.name: undef
entries.documentation: Undefines a previously defined preprocessor macro.

entries.name: ifdef
entries.documentation: Starts a conditional block when a macro is defined.

entries.name: ifndef
entries.documentation: Starts a conditional block when a macro is not defined.

entries.name: elif
entries.documentation: Adds another conditional branch to a preprocessing block.

entries.name: else
entries.documentation: Adds the fallback branch to a preprocessing block.

entries.name: pragma
entries.documentation: Passes implementation-defined instructions to the compiler.
